task_objective: Limit the max width of the Last Operation value field in the QAM panel when using childrenContainerWidth="min" to prevent text overflow and respect textOverflow ellipsis behavior.
design_decisions: Add styling property maxWidth: '60%' on the Last Operation value's wrapper div in src/index.tsx to guarantee the flex layout allocates space correctly under the min-content childrenContainerWidth layout and enables textOverflow ellipsis styling.
results: All tests passed successfully, including python typecheck, linting, frontend typecheck, supply chain verification, and all 233 pytests.
